title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Pi is described as a unique agent framework that enables various use cases like OpenClaw. The video compares Pi against other frontier agents including Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity, discussing how these tools handle increasingly complex harness layer features.
